name: Southwest Torte
recipeIngredient: 4 Bacon Slices, crisply cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Crisply cook and crumble the bacon.
2. Place the oven rack in the lowest position. Heat the oven to 450°F.
3. Prepare the Cornmeal Pastry by mixing flour, cornmeal, oregano, and salt in a bowl. Cut in the shortening until the mixture is coarse crumbs. Gradually add water (1 tablespoon at a time) until the dough holds together.
4. Press the pastry into the bottom and 2-inches up the sides of an ungreased springform pan, 9 X 3 inches.
5. Sprinkle cheese, olives, bacon, bell pepper, and corn in the lined pan.
6. Beat eggs slightly, then beat in remaining ingredients. Pour into the springform pan.
7. Bake uncovered on the lowest rack for 20 minutes.
8. Reduce temperature to 300°F and bake until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean (about 30 more minutes).
9. Let the torte stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
